output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?film ?filmLabel WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; wdt:P161 wd:Q41548 ; wdt:P577 ?date ; rdfs:label ?filmLabel .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 1995)
  FILTER(LANG(?filmLabel) = 'en')
  OPTIONAL {
    ?film p:P161 [ ps:P161 wd:Q41548 ; pq:P462 ?character ] .
    ?character rdfs:label ?charLabel .
    FILTER(CONTAINS(?charLabel , "Miguel Bain"))
  }
  FILTER(bound(?charLabel))
}
LIMIT 1
